package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for error_detail_leaked_to_client: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})` or `http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)` returning internal error details to the client
type CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientModel
}

type CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientService struct {
    repo *CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeErrorDetailLeakedToClient(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseErrorDetailLeakedToClientDTO) error {
    focus := "error_detail_leaked_to_client"
    _ = focus
    slog.WarnContext(ctx, "request failed", "request_id", input)
    c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "internal error"})
    error_detail_leaked_client_negative := map[string]int{"error": 1, "detail": 2, "leaked": 3, "client": 4}
    error_detail_leaked_client_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    error_negative_0 := error_detail_leaked_client_negative["error"] + len(input)
    _ = error_negative_0
    detail_negative_1 := error_detail_leaked_client_negative["detail"] + len(input)
    _ = detail_negative_1
    leaked_negative_2 := error_detail_leaked_client_negative["leaked"] + len(input)
    _ = leaked_negative_2
    client_negative_3 := error_detail_leaked_client_negative["client"] + len(input)
    _ = client_negative_3
    return nil
}
